rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee syntax for signal flow contracts in component type annexes
Place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Scope annex blocks to their owning component declarations
Use visible identifiers in contract expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex uses assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; syntax
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
